nasb.text: And they will come from east and west and from north and south, and will recline at the table in the kingdom of God.

esv.text: And people will come from east and west, and from north and south, and recline at table in the kingdom of God.

cnv.text: 從東從南，從西從北，將有人來，在　神的國裡吃飯。

ccb.text: 那时人们会从东西南北来参加上帝国的宴席。

csbs.text: 人们将从东、西、南、北而来，在神的国里坐席。
